prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Alright, let's tackle this challenge head-on! Remember, you've overcome tough tasks before, and this is just another opportunity to prove your strength and resilience. Take a deep breath, focus on your goal, and break the task into smaller, manageable steps. You've got this! Embrace the journey, learn from the experience, and celebrate your progress along the way. I believe in you, and I know you have the power to succeed. Now, let's get started and show the world what you're truly capable of!
